# Saved Replies

## Issue Checklist (comment)

Please add the following so we can triage and resolve quickly:

- Summary
- Steps to Reproduce
- Expected vs Actual
- Environment (OS, Python, package versions)
- Impact scope
- Logs/Artifacts (with secrets redacted)
- Severity and Priority

## PR Checklist (comment)

Before review, confirm:

- Lint/type/tests/coverage gates pass
- Security scans (Trivy/CodeQL) checked
- Security Considerations section filled
- Risk & Rollback described
- Breaking Changes noted with migration guidance
- Release Notes prepared

Thanks for helping keep quality and security high.
